hero.label: Next Route Travels
hero.sub: From Lagos to London, Serengeti to New York — seamless air travel, West African road trips, and curated international expeditions.
hero.cta_how: How would you like to travel?
hero.cta_no_booking: No automated booking. A travel specialist confirms your options within 24 hours.

home_services.heading: Every Route, Handled.
home_services.flights_body: Connecting Nigeria — locally and globally. From domestic routes between Lagos, Abuja, Port Harcourt, and Kano, to major international hubs in London, Dubai, and New York. We handle every flight, wherever it takes you.
home_services.road_body: Inter-state express services and private charters across West Africa. Experience safe, comfortable, and reliable regional transit. From interstate commuting within Nigeria to private cross-border charters, we keep you moving smoothly.
home_services.latam_body: High-speed rail across Europe and Asia — from the Eurostar through the Channel Tunnel to Japan's legendary Shinkansen. We coordinate routes, seats, and rail passes so you travel in comfort at ground level.

home_destinations.heading: Destination Guides & Local Insights
home_destinations.sub: Travel like a local, no matter where you land. Explore our curated insights to prepare for your next big journey.
home_destinations.rome_body: Discover the eternal city. From navigating historic cobblestone streets to finding the most authentic local culinary secrets, our Rome guide offers essential insights for African travelers exploring Italy.
home_destinations.serengeti_body: Witness nature in its rawest form. Our Serengeti guide prepares you for unforgettable safari expeditions, tracking the great migration, and respecting the local ecosystem.
home_destinations.greek_body: Escape to the breathtaking Mediterranean coast. Learn the best ways to island-hop across Greece, discover hidden beaches, and find the perfect coastal accommodations.

home_about.heading: The Message Behind Next Route Travels
home_about.body1: At Next Route Travels, we believe that travel is more than just moving from one geographical point to another — it is about bridging worlds, expanding horizons, and creating unforgettable stories.
home_about.body2: Our mission is to eliminate the stress of travel planning by offering clear, reliable, and accessible information for both regional commutes and massive international expeditions. We don't just connect roads and flight paths; we connect people to their next great opportunity.

home_features.heading: What Next Route Travels Does For You
home_features.nav_body: We provide up-to-date transit insights, helping travelers from Nigeria understand international flight connections, layovers, and travel requirements without the confusion.
home_features.regional_body: We champion West African unity by detailing safe, structured road travel paths, offering a trusted resource for regional commerce, family visits, and tourism.
home_features.adventure_body: For those looking to step far outside their comfort zone — like riding the Shinkansen across Japan or the Eurostar through Europe — we provide the specialist knowledge, rail pass guidance, and route blueprints needed.
home_features.cultural_body: We believe in respectful, informed travel. Our destination guides ensure that before you even pack your bags, you understand the local culture, accommodation landscapes, and hidden gems.

cta_banner.sub: Tell us where you want to go — we'll take care of everything else.

services_page.heading: Every Journey, Expertly Handled.
services_page.sub: From international flights to cross-continent road expeditions — we cover every route, every mode, every adventure.
services_page.flights_heading: Flights From Nigeria to the World
services_page.flights_body1: We connect Lagos and Abuja to the major international hubs your journey demands. Whether it is a business trip to London, a study placement in Canada, or a holiday escape to Dubai — we coordinate reliable, well-routed flights with minimal layover stress.
services_page.flights_body2: Our flight coordination covers route research, booking guidance, and pre-departure support so you always know exactly what to expect before you board.
services_page.road_heading: Reliable Road Routes Across West Africa
services_page.road_body1: Not every journey requires a flight. Our inter-state and cross-border road travel service covers the most important Nigerian corridors and West African highways — with safety and comfort as non-negotiables.
services_page.road_body2: From express Lagos–Abuja runs to private charters deep into Accra or Cotonou, we provide structured schedules, vetted drivers, and real-time coordination so your road trip feels less like a gamble and more like a plan.
services_page.latam_body1: High-speed rail is the smarter way to move between Europe's great cities — no airport queues, city-centre arrivals, and scenery you simply can't see from 35,000 feet. We handle Eurostar connections, Thalys cross-border routes, and Eurail pass planning so your European leg feels effortless.
services_page.latam_body2: Further east, China's CR400AF bullet trains and Japan's iconic Shinkansen offer some of the world's fastest and most reliable rail journeys. We coordinate tickets, seat classes, and multi-city itineraries across both networks — whether it's Beijing to Shanghai or Tokyo to Osaka.

destinations_page.heading: Destinations We Cover
destinations_page.sub: Every destination we feature is one we know intimately — with curated guides to help you travel smarter.
destinations_page.rome_body: Discover the eternal city. From navigating historic cobblestone streets to finding the most authentic local culinary secrets, our Rome guide offers essential insights for African travelers exploring Italy.
destinations_page.serengeti_body: Witness nature in its rawest form. Our Serengeti guide prepares you for unforgettable safari expeditions, tracking the great migration, and respecting the local ecosystem.
destinations_page.greek_body: Escape to the breathtaking Mediterranean coast. Learn the best ways to island-hop across Greece, discover hidden beaches, and find the perfect coastal accommodations.
destinations_page.dubai_body: Experience the city of gold — from towering skyscrapers to ancient souks. Dubai is the ultimate layover destination upgraded to a full adventure.
destinations_page.london_body: Navigate London like a local — from the Tube to hidden Borough markets, our guide helps Nigerian travelers make the most of their UK stopover or extended stay.
destinations_page.new_york_body: New York is overwhelming in the best possible way. Our guide cuts through the noise — boroughs, transit, neighborhoods, and the spots that matter most for first-time visitors from Nigeria.
destinations_page.colombia_subtitle: Where the Andes Meet the Caribbean
destinations_page.colombia_body: Medellín, Cartagena, the coffee region — Colombia is a revelation. Our guide helps you navigate safety, culture, and the best overland routes across this diverse nation.
destinations_page.guide_body1: Our destination guides aren't built from generic travel blogs. They're informed by real routes, real travelers from Nigeria, and real challenges — visa requirements, currency exchanges, cultural norms, and more.
destinations_page.guide_body2: We update them regularly so the information you rely on is always current.
destinations_page.coming_soon_body: We're constantly expanding. If your destination isn't listed yet, get in touch — we can still help you plan.

our_story_page.heading: We Started Because Travel Shouldn't Be
our_story_page.sub: Born out of frustration and fueled by passion — Next Route Travels exists because every Nigerian deserves to see the world, without the headache.
our_story_page.mission_quote: Travel should feel like freedom, not paperwork.
our_story_page.mission_quote_sub: From the streets of Lagos to the skylines of New York, we believe every journey should be the beginning of something extraordinary.
our_story_page.mission_heading: The Message Behind Next Route Travels
our_story_page.mission_body1: At Next Route Travels, we believe that travel is more than just moving from one geographical point to another — it is about bridging worlds, expanding horizons, and creating unforgettable stories.
our_story_page.mission_body2: Our mission is to eliminate the stress of travel planning by offering clear, reliable, and accessible information for both regional commutes and massive international expeditions. We don't just connect roads and flight paths; we connect people to their next great opportunity.
our_story_page.mission_body3: Driven by reliability, safety, and a passion for exploration, we are here to guide your path every step of the way.
our_story_page.value_reliability_body: We eliminate the stress of travel planning by offering clear, accessible, and structured insights. No vague timelines, no runaround. Just dependable, honest guidance you can plan around.
our_story_page.value_safety_body: Every journey we coordinate is planned with safety at the center — vetted partners, verified routes, and responsible travel practices for every single trip we touch.
our_story_page.value_passion_body: We are driven by a genuine love for discovery. Whether it's Lagos to London or Colombia to Patagonia, we pour that passion into every trip, every guide, every route we plan.
our_story_page.what_we_do_body1: Next Route Travels is a premier travel information and messaging platform dedicated to providing reliable journeys across Nigeria and beyond by connecting people, cultures, and destinations through seamless air travel, cross-border road adventures, and curated international expeditions.
our_story_page.what_we_do_body2: Our mission is to eliminate the stress of travel planning by offering clear, accessible, and structured insights, whether you are looking for international flights connecting Nigeria to major global hubs, safe and comfortable inter-state express services and private charters across West Africa, or specialized SUV overland expeditions through the spectacular landscapes of North and South America.
our_story_page.what_we_do_body3: Beyond regional transit and global connectivity, the platform serves as a comprehensive travel companion featuring curated destination guides and local insights for iconic locations like Rome, the Serengeti, and the Greek Islands, helping travelers understand cultural nuances, find ideal accommodations, and discover hidden gems before they even pack their bags.
our_story_page.brand_quote: We're not just a travel platform. We're the reason you finally said yes to that trip.

enquiries_page.heading: Plan Your Next Journey
enquiries_page.sub: Tell us where you want to go, and we'll handle the rest. Fill in the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
enquiries_page.form_destination_placeholder: Where do you want to go?
enquiries_page.form_message_placeholder: Any other details about your trip, requirements, or questions...
enquiries_page.form_success_body: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your request and get back to you within 24 hours.

locations_globe.label: Our routes
locations_globe.heading: Where we fly & drive
locations_globe.body: From our hub in Lagos, we connect travellers to iconic destinations across Africa, Europe, the Middle East, and beyond.

destination_detail.gallery_desc: Drag to explore. Click to expand. Every photo is a reason to go.
destination_detail.cta_body: Tell us your travel dates and we'll build a personalised {{name}} itinerary within 24 hours.

reviews_page.sub: 340+ verified reviews from real travellers across Africa, Europe, the Middle East and the Americas.
reviews_page.form_review_placeholder: Tell us about your experience with Next Route Travels...
reviews_page.form_success_body: Your review has been submitted and will appear once verified.
reviews_page.cta_sub: Get a free trip quote today

footer.tagline: Connecting Nigeria to the world — one route at a time.
footer.newsletter_success: ✓ You're on the list. Safe travels!

team_page.sub: A Lagos-based team passionate about making world-class travel genuinely accessible for every African explorer.
team_page.values_heading: Three Things We Never Compromise On.
team_page.val1_body: Every itinerary is built around your exact needs — no templates, no off-the-shelf packages. We think in details.
team_page.val2_body: Our network of on-the-ground contacts means we know things the internet doesn't. That local edge is our advantage.
team_page.val3_body: We'll tell you what's worth your budget and what isn't. Our job is to send you somewhere you'll genuinely love.
team_page.cta_sub: Tell us where you want to go and we'll take care of everything else.
